title: Earthquake Safety Video (NDMA India)
description: An official animated guide from India's National Disaster Management Authority on earthquake safety. Fully verified and embeddable.

title: Flood Safety: Know Your Risk
description: An official Ready.gov video explaining how to understand your flood risk and take action to protect yourself and your property.

title: Hurricane Preparedness Guide
description: A comprehensive guide on how to prepare for and stay safe during a hurricane or cyclone.

title: First Aid: How to Treat Severe Bleeding
description: Learn the critical steps to control severe bleeding and potentially save a life with this guide from the British Red Cross.

title: How to Build a 'Go-Bag' Emergency Kit
description: Ready.gov shows you how to assemble a portable emergency kit with all the essentials for any disaster.

title: Tsunami Safety Information
description: Learn what to do to stay safe during a tsunami with this guide from the National Weather Service.

title: Create a Family Emergency Plan
description: Disasters can separate families. Learn from Ready.gov how to create a simple communication plan to reconnect.

title: Lightning Safety Indoors and Outdoors
description: An essential guide on staying safe during a thunderstorm from the National Weather Service. Remember: When Thunder Roars, Go Indoors!

title: First Aid: How to Help a Choking Adult
description: A clear and simple guide from St John Ambulance on how to perform back blows and abdominal thrusts for someone who is choking.
